raw_consumer_statement: I ordered a refrigerator from XXXX, but was notified that it was out of stock, to order a different one. I found another for XXXX. It was delivered and I put it into a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. The next month on XXXX my citibank app suggested to put my purchase onto a XXXX XXXX. I thought I made a mistake and put it into XXXX XXXX # XXXX. This amount was XXXX. Citibank readded the canceled refrigerator onto my card as XXXX XXXX XXXX. It never left the warehouse! I was paying for 2 refrigerators. I canceled XXXX XXXX and it was canceled from XXXX but the balance of XXXX was added back onto my standard purchases. I had made 3 payments of {$110.00}. I have made at least 25 call and written a certified letter. I escalated my complaint in XX/XX/XXXX. They sent it to an analyst in SD. XXXX added my purchases and fees from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX. It was {$22000.00}. My payments and credits were {$21000.00}. Balance XXXX proving I was overcharged by {$1200.00}. My bill showed a ballace due of {$2200.00}. Citibank won't respond or give written explanation.
